activities.title: Tokyo Metropolitan Government Building Observation
activities.description: Take the high-speed elevator to the 45th floor panoramic deck with clear views of Mount Fuji.

activities.title: Michelin Star Ramen Tasting at Nakiryu
activities.description: Slurp world-famous tantanmen ramen with rich nutty broth handcrafted by master noodle chefs.

activities.title: Omoide Yokocho (Memory Lane) Izakaya Crawl
activities.description: Wander smoky lantern-lit alleys packed with tiny stalls serving yakitori and ice-cold draft beer.

activities.title: teamLab Planets Immersive Digital Art Museum
activities.description: Walk barefoot through glowing water mazes and digital crystal rooms in Toyosu.

activities.title: Harajuku Takeshita Street & Omotesando Boutiques
activities.description: Explore eclectic pop fashion stalls, crepe stands, and sleek flagship architectural boutiques.

activities.title: Shibuya Scramble Crossing & Rooftop Sky View
activities.description: Watch thousands cross the world's busiest intersection simultaneously from Shibuya Sky terrace.

activities.title: Senso-ji Temple & Nakamise Dori Street
activities.description: Pass through the giant Thunder Gate and shop for traditional crafts and fresh ningyoyaki cakes.

activities.title: Tsukiji Outer Market Seafood Feast
activities.description: Savor melt-in-your-mouth otoro tuna sushi, wagyu skewers, and sweet tamagoyaki egg rolls.

activities.title: Akihabara Electric Town & Retro Gaming Tour
activities.description: Immerse yourself in multi-story anime galleries, retro arcade halls, and cutting-edge electronics superstores.
